title: TrustForge Dangerous Actions Catalog
description: Canonical catalog of action names with their danger tags and default enforcement. Consumed by the agent-contract deep validator and AI integration guide.

dangerous_actions_version.description: Version of the dangerous-actions catalog schema itself.

actions.description: Known-dangerous action entries. Contracts should cross-reference this catalog when declaring danger_tags.

CatalogEntry.description: Catalog entry for one dangerous action.

danger_tags.description: Danger categories assigned to this action.

default_reversible.description: Whether this action is intrinsically reversible.

mandatory_tags.description: Tags that any contract using this action MUST also declare. Used by the deep validator.

description.description: Human-readable description of why this action is dangerous.
